verses.1: But now the LORD who created you, Jacob,
verses.2: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you,
verses.3: For I am the LORD your God,
verses.4: Since you have been precious and honored in my sight,
verses.5: Don’t be afraid, for I am with you.
verses.6: I will tell the north, ‘Give them up!’
verses.7: everyone who is called by my name,
verses.8: Bring out the blind people who have eyes,
verses.9: Let all the nations be gathered together,
verses.10: “You are my witnesses,” says the LORD,
verses.12: I have declared, I have saved, and I have shown,
verses.13: Yes, since the day was, I am he.
verses.14: The LORD, your Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel says: “For your sake, I have sent to Babylon, and I will bring all of them down as fugitives, even the Chaldeans, in the ships of their rejoicing.
verses.15: I am the LORD, your Holy One, the Creator of Israel, your King.”
verses.16: The LORD, who makes a way in the sea,
verses.17: who brings out the chariot and horse,
verses.19: Behold, I will do a new thing.
verses.20: The animals of the field, the jackals and the ostriches, shall honor me,
verses.21: the people which I formed for myself,
verses.22: Yet you have not called on me, Jacob;
verses.23: You have not brought me any of your sheep for burnt offerings,
verses.24: You have bought me no sweet cane with money,
verses.25: I, even I, am he who blots out your transgressions for my own sake;
verses.28: Therefore I will profane the princes of the sanctuary;
